use clap::Parser;
use std::fmt;

#[derive(Parser)]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(long, env = "GITHUB_TOKEN")]
    github_token: Secret,

    #[arg(long, env = "NPM_TOKEN")]
    npm_token: Secret,

    #[arg(long)]
    username: String,
}

struct Secret(String);

impl fmt::Debug for Secret {
    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {
        write!(f, "[REDACTED]")
    }
}

fn main() {
    let cli = Cli::parse();
    println!("connecting as {}", cli.username);
    println!("token: {:?}", cli.github_token);
}
